question_text: Use the diagram shown below to identify which generation first shows the trait.

answer_key.explanation: The shaded label appears first in Generation II.

visual.caption: Pedigree stimulus with two generations labelled for trait tracking.
visual.altText: A pedigree-style biology diagram with generation labels I and II and a shaded trait marker in generation II.

spec.title: Trait pedigree
notes: Shaded marker denotes the observed trait.
